# scalegrid_firewall (Resource)

Manages the cluster-level IP whitelist (firewall) for a ScaleGrid cluster. This resource owns the complete CIDR list for the cluster; applying it replaces any existing rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manage the complete IP whitelist for a cluster.
resource "scalegrid_firewall" "mongo" {
  database   = "mongodb"
  cluster_id = scalegrid_cluster.mongo.id
  cidr_list = [
    "203.0.113.0/24",
    "198.51.100.10/32",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr_list` (List of String) Complete list of CIDR ranges allowed to connect (e.g. `["10.0.0.0/8"]`).
- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the cluster the whitelist applies to.
- `database` (String) Database engine of the cluster: `mongodb`, `redis`, `mysql`, or `postgresql`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the firewall configuration (the cluster ID).
